pi_items.source: Analyzed setup_task.sh which explicitly defines and creates PROJECT_DIR='/home/ga/PycharmProjects/midi_builder'.
Counted exactly 5 test functions in the test files (test_encoder.py and test_sequencer.py) generated by setup_task.sh.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically generated code located in the project directory '/home/ga/PycharmProjects/midi_builder'. The test suite contains exactly 5 tests (test_vlq_single_byte, test_vlq_two_bytes, test_vlq_large_number, test_delta_time_logic, test_end_of_track_marker), which contradicts the metadata claim of 8 tests. Passing the task requires achieving a score of at least 60 based on test results, code analysis, and binary verification of the generated MIDI file.
